name: paper-deadlines
description: DDL Radar - CS conference deadline tracker

scripts.pack:extension: mkdir -p dist && cd clients/extension && zip -rq ../../dist/ddl-radar-extension.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' -x 'STORE.md' -x 'README.md' && echo 'dist/ddl-radar-extension.zip 已生成'
scripts.build:obsidian: cd clients/obsidian-plugin && npm run build && cp main.js styles.css manifest.json ../..
